results.reason: Wiktionary is ranking for the word 'futia' as a Finnish/Swahili verb definition. High domain authority but irrelevant content — Google is showing it because no strong branded page exists. Fix: create a clear branded homepage or about page with 'Futia' prominently in title, H1, and schema markup.
Academic personal page for a researcher named Matt Futia. Thin content with no SEO optimization. Ranking on name match alone. Beatable with one well-structured branded page.

Federal University of Technology Ikot Abasi (FUTIA) — institutional domain with massive authority and exact brand match. Not beatable on the acronym. Fix: differentiate by targeting 'Mike Futia' or 'Futia AI' as your branded query instead.

n8n.io owns the template marketplace — they host the actual workflow templates. DR 80+ domain with exact-match content. You cannot outrank them for their own template pages. Fix: target a review/tutorial angle like 'n8n Nano Banana template tutorial' or 'best n8n AI image workflows 2026' instead.

Second n8n.io template page occupying another SERP slot. They own positions 1-3 for this query. Going head-to-head is futile. Fix: create a comparison or tutorial post that links to these templates while targeting long-tail variations.

Reddit discussion thread ranking on community engagement. Content is user-generated and not deeply optimized. Fix: a comprehensive tutorial post with screenshots and step-by-step instructions would provide more value than a Reddit thread.
